title: MADRAS YOUTH DROP IN CENTER - 211info
text: SRIPONYA COLLECTIVE MADRAS YOUTH DROP IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop in center with activities, food, education support, youth peer support, arts, crafts, and community support. 29 SE D Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Ages 11-17 Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10:30am-6:30pm Email (541) 498-0968 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 498-0968 Main phone Main phone (541) 498-0968 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Madras Services: Youth Centers Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PEER SUPPORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
